description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of 100% polyester, has a softly ribbed white neckline, mesh panels on the sides, adidas 3-Stripes printed on both sleeves, brand name and logo printed on the left chest, grey piping from the back of the armholes extending to the front hem, and is engineered with ClimaCool technology Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water below 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations This sporty white T-shirt from adidas is the answer to upping your casual style. The contrast stripes and piping look great against the white front, making you stand out in a crowd with ease! And forget about sweat as the soft comfortable cotton and the mesh panels keep you fresh all through the day. Pair it with jeans, shorts or tracks for a great look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulder 18&rdquo
